name: IT Payments Team
description: Creates, validates and sends payment instructions through SEPA and SWIFT channels.

name: IT Compliance Team
description: Operates sanctions, AML and market-abuse surveillance platforms and compliance decision integration.

name: Settlement & Reconciliation Team
description: Validates settled status and reconciles payment records to external movement.

name: Data Integration Team
description: Runs Input Hub and maintains data pipelines and data quality for dependent systems.

name: IT Service Desk Team
description: Provides level 1 and level 2 user and system support to every operational team.

name: Ticketing Systems Team
description: Owns and operates the Ticketing System used for incident and request tracking.

name: Identity Management Team
description: Controls identities, entitlements and permission lifecycle for all managed systems.

name: I/D Investigation and Development Team
description: Explores opportunities and builds potential new systems and innovation prototypes.

name: EU Regulatory Oversight Team
description: Reviews ICT and processing activities for DORA and GDPR alignment.

name: Payments Business Ownership Team
description: Provides business ownership and approval policy for payment systems.

name: Compliance Decision Team
description: Owns sanctions, AML and market-abuse business decision frameworks.
